allow: Bash(ssh bugman.lan "python3 --version 2>/dev/null; which python3 2>/dev/null; uname -m; ls ~/.hermes 2>/dev/null || echo 'no .hermes dir'; ls ~/.local/bin/hermes 2>/dev/null || echo 'hermes not installed'")

Bash(ssh bugman.lan "cat /etc/os-release | head -5; which uv 2>/dev/null || echo 'no uv'; which node 2>/dev/null || echo 'no node'; which gcc 2>/dev/null || echo 'no gcc'; cat /etc/nix-ld.conf 2>/dev/null || echo 'no nix-ld config'; ls /lib/ld-linux* 2>/dev/null || echo 'no standard ld'; nixos-option programs.nix-ld.enable 2>/dev/null || echo 'cant check nix-ld'")
